summary: Iteration 16 testing complete. Comprehensive testing of new user authentication system, product shop, shopping cart, order placement, and login-based voting. All 29 backend API tests passed. Full E2E UI flow tested successfully: registration, login, profile management, shop browsing, add to cart, cart management, checkout, order placement, and order viewing in profile. Voting system now requires login - shows login prompt when not authenticated, allows voting when logged in.
critical_code_review_comments: Customer auth uses JWT tokens stored in localStorage (customer_token) and httpOnly cookie (user_access_token)
Admin auth is separate from customer auth (uses AuthContext/useAdminAuth)
Cart requires authentication - redirects to login if not logged in
Checkout form pre-fills shipping info from user profile
Orders use 'pay on delivery' - no payment integration needed
Voting now requires customer login - no more email/name form
Vote withdrawal and revote functionality working
Products seeded from lefteriafc.cy with real images (6 items)
All UI text is in Greek as required
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with unique emails (uuid-based)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified the new user authentication system, product shop, shopping cart, order placement, and login-based voting. Key features: 1) Customer registration at /register with name, email, password, phone, 2) Customer login at /login, 3) Profile page at /profile with tabs for profile info, orders, and password change, 4) Shop page at /shop shows 6 real products from lefteriafc.cy with size selection, 5) Add to cart requires login, 6) Cart page at /cart with qty controls and total, 7) Checkout at /checkout with pre-filled shipping form, 8) Order placement creates order and clears cart, 9) Orders visible in profile under Παραγγελίες tab, 10) Cart badge in header shows item count, 11) Vote page at /vote shows login prompt if not logged in, allows voting when logged in.
